title: Orbital Strike Cannon
description: Adds Wemmbu's Orbital Strike Cannon with customizable stab and nuke shots along with easy to understand settings.
body:
Adds the Orbital Strike cannons from Unstable SMP That Wemmbu uses along with a very customizable chat interface with easy to understand settings.

в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ

**COMMANDS**

**/function osc:help** - Shows how to use the datapack.
**/function osc:settings/troubleshooting/all** - Troubleshoots for errors.
**/function osc:settings/fix** - Fixes any errors.
**/function osc:settings/show** - Shows the settings you can customize via scoreboard.

**/function osc:giveitem/stab_shot** - Gives you the Stab Shot item. (Right click to fire)
**/function osc:giveitem/nuke_shot** - Gives you the Nuke Shot item. (Right click to fire)

**Use the precison firing panel instead of the commands below if you are version 1.0.1 or above!**
**/function osc:stab/fire {x:<X COORDINATE>,y:<Y COORDINATE>,z:<Z COORDINATE>}** - Fires a stab shot at the selected coordinates. (Replace the paramters like <Y COORDINATE> with the coordinates you want to fire at.)
**/function osc:nuke/fire {x:<X COORDINATE>,y:<Y COORDINATE>,z:<Z COORDINATE>}** - Fires a nuke shot at the selected coordinates. (Replace the paramters like <Y COORDINATE> with the coordinates you want to fire at.)

**INFO**
- Entering setting values outside of the given parameters can result in errors which will prevent stabs/nukes from firing. To troubleshoot, see commands.

**COMPATIBILITY**
- This datapack with not work with paper serves unless you tweak the max number of primed tnt entities that can be loaded at once. This can be found in 'spigot.yml'. It is recommended you change this to 5,000 or even 10,000 whilst using this datapack.

**WARNING**                                           
- This datapack, nukes in particular can cause lag to the server or clients of players. Additionally, customizing the payloads can also result in performance drops. Use at your own risk!

   Update 1.0.1 has released!

- Custom panel for editing settings, much easier to use than the scoreboard previously used.
- New settings for nuke shots and stab shots.
